# supsurf.ge — Premium SUP Board Rentals, Sales & Tours in Georgia

> supsurf.ge is Georgia's leading Stand-Up Paddleboard (SUP) rental station, online shop, and water sports adventure organizer operating across Tbilisi (Lisi Lake), Batumi, and Anaklia.

## Core Offerings
- **SUP Board Rental**: Daily inflatable SUP board package for 50 GEL/day or 80 GEL/2 days. Full kit includes paddleboard, carbon paddle, life vest, leash, double-action pump, and waterproof phone case.
- **Watersports Shop**: New and certified used inflatable SUP boards, carbon paddles, waterproof dry bags, life vests, and accessories with official warranty and nationwide shipping in Georgia.
- **Guided SUP Tours & Lessons**: Sunset & sunrise paddleboard tours on Lisi Lake, Batumi coastal surfing lessons, and corporate team building water events.

## Primary Locations & Service Hubs
- **Tbilisi**: Lisi Lake Park, Northern Shore (Daily 09:00 - 21:00)
- **Batumi**: Miracle Beach & Boulevard Coastline (Daily 08:00 - 20:00)
- **Anaklia**: Main Boulevard Pier (Daily 10:00 - 22:00)

## Top Paddling Destinations in Georgia
1. Lisi Lake (Tbilisi)
2. Bazaleti Lake (Mtskheta-Mtianeti)
3. Sioni Reservoir (Tianeti)
4. Shaori Reservoir (Racha)
5. Zhinvali Reservoir (Ananuri)
6. Batumi Black Sea Coast

## Contact & Reservations
- **Website**: https://www.supsurf.ge
- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +995 592 05 50 17
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/sun_set_paddle/
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/SUNSETPSUP/
